case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION VS. FERSAN WINARDJA et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT WINARDJA, FERSAN

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-26-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT FERSAN WINARDJA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WINARDJA, FERSAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-18-2010

GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT WINARDJA, FERSAN

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-12-2010 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT FERSAN WINARDJA'S APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 CONTINUED FROM MAY-12-2010 TO MASTER CALENDAR MOTION AT MAY-26-2010, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR APPLICANT TO FILL OUT THE APPLICATION WITH COMPLETE INFORMATION AS TO THE ITEMS LISTED IN FORM FW-001. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
